title: Very Grindy Progression
description: Crafting recipes for most tools and armor are far more expensive. Also locks certain OP features until you craft all diamond or netherite equipment.
body:
# Very Grindy Progression
This datapack changes recipes for most tools and armor to require ridiculous amount of resources to craft them, or just makes them more annoying to make. Normal crafting recipes are removed.

I really don't know why would anyone want to play with this, but i made it none the less. One of my friends thought of this dumb idea one time, and I finally made it.

Includes most materials except leather and netherite.

### Features
<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>
Wooden recipes now use stripped wood instead of planks, except wooden axes which use normal wood. Showcase below.

---

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K8Wke1cT/images/af97e10d117b18d182adfac5db9d75bc2b2b6d0e.png)

---

Stone tools are now made of smooth stone, because everyone loves to smelt smooth stone, right? 

---

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K8Wke1cT/images/7a5cb6450e45158c2a10cafe803b7e8db9a0eb22.png)

---

Iron tools and armor are made of iron blocks instead of ingots. Buckets too.

---

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K8Wke1cT/images/ab08e91905a9d0c0b6d7ae0e75d378c6c1b69fb9.png)

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K8Wke1cT/images/f0c8d8e25c3c15b5d11d6e1dc3d9db676fe2eb72.png)

---

Golden tools and armor are made of gold blocks. Very fun.

---

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K8Wke1cT/images/535e6a7922d9a50d807216185fa036fc1f9687be.png)

---

Diamond tools and armor are made of diamond blocks. Yes, that means that a chestplate costs 72 diamonds. full set costs 24*9=216 diamonds. Not including tools. But don't worry, netherite remains unchanged.

---

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K8Wke1cT/images/a6ae778eabdc9cf4e0dc8e6640121889849a528f.png)

---

</details>
<details>
<summary>Feature Locks</summary>

### End City Lock
Until you obtain all diamond armor and tools, you cannot visit end cities. Well, you can, but it will not end well.
*You thought you could just loot some end cities and not care about expensive crafting? Better luck next time.*

### Villager Lock
Until you get all netherite tools and armor (yes, even a netherite hoe), you cant trade with villagers. Again, you "can" but it will not end well for you, neither for the villager.
<details>
  <summary>Spoiler for what will happen</summary>

  You will explode when you enter an end city or interact with villagers. And that explosion will also destroy your items. You really got to be careful.
</details>


</details>

### Other
If you have any suggestion or found any bugs, join my discord server (link in external sources)
